ddt:Target.Name: SVS470_SVS470_000527_00.01.20.ddt
ddt:Target.Description:
Development variant 0x000527
valid for SW-Version: 17/07.00
VMM: 2014_42b
Rel. E03
SLP10.10.02

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Top View Trailer Coupling Mode present

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: Calibration Steering Wheel Neutral Position Start
Calibration Steering Wheel Neutral Position Request Results

DataItem.Name: Top View Trailer Coupling Mode present

Request.Name: DataRead.A08 Top View Front View Read
DataRead.A09 Top View Rear View Read
DataRead.A10 Top View Side View Forward Read
DataRead.A11 Top View Side View Backward Read
DataRead.A12 Top View Top Zoom Front Read
DataRead.A13 Top View Top Zoom Rear Read
DataRead.A14 Full Screen Front Side View Read
DataRead.A15 Full Screen Rear Side View Read
DataRead.A16 Top View Trailer Coupling Mode Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read
DataRead.A18 Full screen Single View Read
DataRead.A19 Split Screen Single View Read
DataRead.A22 Object Detection Front Camera Read
DataRead.A23 Object Detection Rear Camera Read
DataRead.A26 HMI Full Screen Front View Read
DataRead.A27 HMI Full Screen Rear View Read

DataItem.Name: Top View Trailer Coupling Mode present

Request.Name: DataWrite.A08 Top View Front View Write
DataWrite.A09 Top View Rear View Write
DataWrite.A10 Top View Side View Forward Write
DataWrite.A11 Top View Side View Backward Write
DataWrite.A12 Top View Top Zoom Front Write
DataWrite.A13 Top View Top Zoom Rear Write
DataWrite.A14 Full Screen Front Side View Write
DataWrite.A15 Full Screen Rear Side View Write
DataWrite.A16 Top View Trailer Coupling Mode Write
DataWrite.A18 Full screen Single View Write
DataWrite.A19 Split Screen Single View Write
DataWrite.A22 Object Detection Front Camera Write
DataWrite.A23 Object Detection Rear Camera Write
DataWrite.A26 HMI Full Screen Front View Write
DataWrite.A27 HMI Full Screen Rear View Write

Test.Description: The control unit 360 degree viewing system has a malfunction. System Internal Failures.
The control unit ''360 degree viewing system'' has a malfunction. Calibration / Parameter Memory Failure.
The control unit 360 degree viewing system has a malfunction. Missing calibration.
The control unit 360 degree viewing system has a malfunction. Not configured.
The camera "Rear end 360 degree viewing system" has a malfunction. General Electric Failure.
The camera "Rear end 360 degree viewing system" has a malfunction. System Internal Failures.
The camera ''Front end 360 degree viewing system'' has a malfunction. General Electric Failure.
The camera ''Front end 360 degree viewing system'' has a malfunction. System Internal Failures.
The camera ''360 degree viewing system in left outside mirror'' has a malfunction. General Electric Failure.
The camera ''360 degree viewing system in left outside mirror'' has a malfunction. System Internal Failures.
The camera ''360 degree viewing system in right outside mirror'' has a malfunction. General Electric Failure.
The camera ''360 degree viewing system in right outside mirror'' has a malfunction. System Internal Failures.
LVDS communication has a malfunction. General Electrical Failure.
The power supply in the system is too low.
The power supply in the system is too high.
The power supply is too low.
The power supply is too high.
The current vehicle identification number is incorrect or not present.
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with the engine control unit has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit Transmission" has a malfunction." Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Traction system'' has a malfunction. Missing Message.
Communication with control unit Power steering" has a malfunction." Missing message.
Communication with the front signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the rear signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the central gateway has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Audio or COMAND'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with PARKTRONIC has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Left rear door'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit "Right rear door'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Left front door'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Right front door'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the steering column module has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the trailer connection unit has a malfunction. Missing message.
Implausible data were received from the engine control unit.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''Traction system''.
Implausible data were received from control unit Power steering.
Implausible data were received from the instrument cluster.
Implausible data were received from the electronic ignition lock.
Implausible data were received from the steering column module.
Implausible data were received from the central gateway.
Implausible data were received from control unit ''PARKTRONIC''.
Communication with the front end CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with control unit "Camera Protection Flap" has a malfunction. Missing message.
